detailed_description: The video features a dynamic 3D animation of numerous red, somewhat translucent cells against a deep red background. These cells, resembling blood cells or bacteria, are shown in constant motion, tumbling, floating, and occasionally deforming or appearing to divide. The visual emphasizes the fluid and active environment at a microscopic, cellular level, showcasing biological processes in action.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment serves as the semantic core, demonstrating a biological process (cellular movement and division) through a dynamic 3D animation. It perfectly fits the 'THE PROCESS/LABOR' hero moment criterion by visually explaining a complex mechanism. The video starts and ends directly with this core action, thus applying the 'NO-MISTAKE' rule to keep its full duration.
